author: nero_eth
content: I think EELS + EIP are still at option 2 right now. E.g. the EIP says: "If any of these checks fails, the delegated address is not loaded and MUST NOT appear in the BAL"

author: nero_eth
content: EELS might need to revert #2473 and #2882

author: nero_eth
content:
Please review this one. It reverts back to option 1:
https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11838

author: gurukamath
content: Yes. These have been reverted to option 1 and should already reflect in the v6.1.0 release

author: gurukamath
content: The delegate is accessed (and included in BAL) [first](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/4bc0fc6a7b69639db396a301302352f8cd9fc5be/src/ethereum/forks/amsterdam/vm/instructions/system.py#L463) and the balance checks happen [later](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/4bc0fc6a7b69639db396a301302352f8cd9fc5be/src/ethereum/forks/amsterdam/vm/instructions/system.py#L490)
